title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Commission for Backward Classes (Repeal) Act, 2018. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 15th August, 2018, vide notification No. S.O. 3988(E), dated 14th August, 2018, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
